---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a public-safe improvement to the open workspace, prompts, skills, adapters, or checks.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## User problem

What real confusion or workflow failure would this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest public-safe change.

## Why this belongs in open source

Explain why this is generic and does not depend on private templates, private routing, or paid calibration.

## Acceptance

How should maintainers verify the change?

## Privacy check

- [ ] This request does not include private workspace content, tokens, email addresses, actual client material, or local personal paths.
